layout: null
---
# Houzi Documentation

Houzi is a premium white-label real estate Flutter application designed to connect with the Houzez WordPress theme. This documentation covers installation, configuration, and customization.

## Essential Documentation
- [AI Agents Skill Guide](https://houzi-doc.booleanbites.com/ai-agents/houzi_skill): Comprehensive guide on how to use AI coding assistants with Houzi.
- [Full Documentation Content](https://houzi-doc.booleanbites.com/llms-full.txt): A single file containing the entire documentation site for AI consumption.
- [Houzi App Setup](https://houzi-doc.booleanbites.com/app-setup/change_app_url): Learn how to connect the app to your WordPress site.
- [Customization via Hooks](https://houzi-doc.booleanbites.com/hooks-widgets/add_item_in_drawer): Detailed guide on using HooksV2 for deep customization.
- [Configuration Builder](https://houzi-doc.booleanbites.com/houzi-builder/intro): Visual tool for configuring the app layout and features.

## Developer Resources
- [Buy Houzi License](https://codecanyon.net/item/houzi-real-estate-app/39753350): Purchase the official app license on CodeCanyon.
- [Houzi Website](https://houzi.booleanbites.com)
- [Houzez WordPress Theme](https://themeforest.net/item/houzez-real-estate-wordpress-theme/15649693)

## Technical Stack
- **Framework**: Flutter (Dart)
- **Backend**: WordPress (Houzez Theme)
- **Authentication**: JWT, Firebase, Social Logins
- **State Management**: Provider
- **Storage**: Hive
